ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of weather event (e.g., Snow, Rain) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., Light, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event in UTC */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event in UTC */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the event location */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code nearest to the event location */,
  "location_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "location_lng" REAL /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the event occurred */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the event occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the event occurred */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Postal code for the event location */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Active, Resolved, Archived) */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* ID of the data source (e.g., Satellite, Weather Station) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the weather event */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level of the event (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Forecast accuracy of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "county" TEXT /* County name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Postal code */,
  "location_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "location_lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone_offset" INTEGER /* Timezone offset in hours from UTC */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the weather type */,
  "common_causes" TEXT /* Common causes of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation in reports */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for each severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code for the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "timezone_offset" INTEGER /* Timezone offset in hours from UTC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather event being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "report" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., Trend Analysis, Impact Analysis) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  "publicly_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the analysis is publicly shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_analysis_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., meteorologist, data scientist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the analyst */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather event being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., Error, Info, Warning) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather event related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Alert, Update) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Notification channel (e.g., Email, SMS, App) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)
